name: Tomato Soup
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and cook until soft, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 more minute.
Add tomatoes (with juices) and vegetable stock. Bring to a simmer and cook for 20 minutes.
Blend until smooth using an immersion blender (or in batches in a countertop blender).
Stir in cream and season with salt and pepper.
Serve hot, topped with fresh basil.
notes: Swap the cream for coconut milk to make this dairy-free.
